name: north-data
description: Search and retrieve company, Handelsregister, and financial data for firms in Germany, Austria, Switzerland, and other European countries via the North Data Data API

envVars.name: NORTHDATA_API_KEY
envVars.description: North Data API key (format XXXX-XXXX), sent as the X-Api-Key header

tools.name: Search Companies
tools.description: Fuzzy universal search for companies (and optionally persons) by free-text query, e.g. 'Siemens, München'. Use this to find a company before fetching its details.

query.description: Search string; may combine name and city, e.g. 'Müller GmbH, Hamburg'

domain.description: Restrict result domain: 'company' or 'person'; leave empty for both

countries.description: Two-letter ISO country codes to search in, e.g. DE, AT, CH

status.description: Company status filter: active, terminated, liquidation

historicalSummary.omitted: match scores and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Get Company
tools.description: Retrieve a single company's profile (register info, address, status, financial indicators). Identify it either by name + address (city), or by registerId + registerCity, or by companyId from a previous search.

name.description: Full company name including legal form, e.g. 'Beispiel GmbH' (combine with address)

address.description: Company address; specifying just the city is sufficient (combine with name)

registerId.description: Commercial register ID, e.g. 'HRB 12345' (combine with registerCity)

registerCity.description: City of the register court, e.g. 'Hamburg' (combine with registerId)

companyId.description: North Data internal company ID from a previous search result

tools.name: Power Search
tools.description: Structured company search with filters for location radius, industry segment, legal form, status, and countries. Billed per unique company returned, so keep filters narrow.

keywords.description: Keywords matched against company name, subject, and segment

address.description: Address at any precision (city, street, ...) as the geographic center

maxDistanceKm.description: Search radius in km around the given address

countries.description: Two-letter ISO country codes, e.g. DE, AT, CH

status.description: Company status filter: active, terminated, liquidation

legalForm.description: Legal form filter, e.g. GmbH, AG, UG

tools.name: Suggest Companies
tools.description: Auto-complete suggestions for a partial company or person name. Free of charge — suggested companies do not count toward the monthly quota, so use this as a cheap first pass before Get Company.

domain.description: Restrict suggestions to 'company' or 'person'; omit for both

countries.description: Two-letter ISO country codes, e.g. DE, AT, CH

status.description: Company status filter: active, terminated, liquidation

tools.name: Get Person
tools.description: Look up a person (officer, shareholder, representative) by name and address or by a person ID from a previous search result. Billed like company lookups.

address.description: Address or city to disambiguate common names

personId.description: North Data internal person ID from a previous search result (alternative to name lookup)

prompts.title: Look up a company
prompts.prompt: Look up the company '<name>, <city>' in North Data and summarize its register entry, status, and key financial indicators.

prompts.title: Regional industry scan
prompts.prompt: Use North Data power search to find active companies of a given industry within 25 km of a city and list name, city, and legal form.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: North Data API setup

steps.title: Get a North Data Premium account with API access
steps.description: The Data API is part of North Data's paid Data Services. Request access (a trial can be arranged) at https://www.northdata.de/_data or via sales.

steps.title: Obtain your API key
steps.description: After activation you receive an API key in the format XXXX-XXXX from North Data.

steps.title: Set the environment variable
steps.description: Set NORTHDATA_API_KEY in your .env. The key is sent as the X-Api-Key HTTP header on every request.

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run Get Company with name='<a known company>' and address='<its city>' and confirm a JSON profile is returned.

notes: Only successful queries are billed; search endpoints are billed per unique company returned — keep power search filters narrow
In Germany, company name plus city uniquely identify a company; alternatively use registerId + registerCity (e.g. 'HRB 12345' + 'Hamburg')
The API serves JSON by default and is also reachable under www.northdata.com with the same paths
